command:
cat /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cc001/SOUL.md && printf '
---FILE---
' && cat /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cc001/USER.md && printf '
---FILE---
' && ls /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cc001/memory >/dev/null 2>&1 && { f=$(date -u +%F); g=$(date -u -d 'yesterday' +%F 2>/dev/null || python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
print((datetime.now(timezone.utc)-timedelta(days=1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))
PY
); for x in "$f" "$g"; do [ -f "/home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cc001/memory/$x.md" ] && { printf '
---FILE---
'; cat "/home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cc001/memory/$x.md"; }; done; } ; [ -f /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cc001/MEMORY.md ] && { printf '
---FILE---
'; cat /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cc001/MEMORY.md; } ; [ -f /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cc001/BOOTSTRAP.md ] && { printf '
---FILE---
'; cat /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cc001/BOOTSTRAP.md; }
